---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve ARIA OS
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened instead.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (include screenshots if applicable).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126]
- Device: [e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15, Pixel 8]
- App Version: [from footer: vX.X.X]

## Severity
- [ ] P0 — Blocking (cannot continue working)
- [ ] P1 — Critical (major feature broken)
- [ ] P2 — Minor (non-critical issue)
- [ ] P3 — Cosmetic (visual only)

## Logs
```logs
Paste any error logs from console or Sentry
```

## Possible Solution
Optional: suggest a fix or root cause.

## Related Issues
#issue-number
